title: Butter Chicken Murgh Makhani

seo.title: Authentic Butter Chicken Recipe (Murgh Makhani) | Easy
seo.metaDescription: Master the art of authentic Indian Butter Chicken (Murgh Makhani) with our easy-to-follow recipe. Get creamy, rich, and flavorful results at home. Perfect for lunch!
longTailKeywords: how to make Butter Chicken Murgh Makhani
easy Butter Chicken recipe at home
Murgh Makhani recipe step by step
lowCompetitionKeywords: homemade Butter Chicken Murgh Makhani recipe
restaurant style Butter Chicken at home
seo.h1: Authentic Indian Butter Chicken (Murgh Makhani) Recipe
h2Headings: What is Butter Chicken Murgh Makhani?
Ingredients You Need for Butter Chicken
Step-by-Step Instructions to Make Murgh Makhani
Pro Tips for the Best Butter Chicken
seo.imageAlt: A bowl of creamy, rich, and authentic Indian Butter Chicken (Murgh Makhani) garnished with fresh cilantro and served with naan bread.
seo.imageCaption: Indulge in the rich flavors of homemade Butter Chicken (Murgh Makhani), a classic Indian dish perfect for any meal.

description: Butter Chicken Murgh Makhani is a beloved Indian classic known for its rich, creamy tomato-based sauce and tender pieces of marinated chicken. This iconic dish offers a perfect balance of sweet, tangy, and subtly spicy flavors, making it a comforting and incredibly satisfying meal. It is a true culinary delight that captures the essence of Indian cuisine.

ingredients.item: Boneless, skinless chicken thighs or breast

instructions.title: Marinate the Chicken
instructions.text: In a bowl, combine chicken pieces with yogurt, 1 tsp ginger-garlic paste, red chili powder, turmeric, 1/4 tsp garam masala, salt, and lemon juice. Mix well, cover, and marinate in the refrigerator for at least 30 minutes, or preferably 2-4 hours.

instructions.title: Cook the Chicken
instructions.text: Heat 1 tbsp ghee or butter in a large pan over medium-high heat. Add the marinated chicken pieces and cook in batches until lightly browned and cooked through, about 5-7 minutes per batch. Set aside.

instructions.title: Prepare the Sauce Base
instructions.text: In the same pan, add the remaining 1 tbsp ghee or butter. Add the chopped onion and sauté until translucent, about 5-7 minutes. Add the remaining 1 tbsp ginger-garlic paste and cook for another minute until fragrant.

instructions.title: Simmer the Tomato Sauce
instructions.text: Stir in the crushed tomatoes, sugar, remaining 1/4 tsp garam masala, and salt to taste. Bring to a simmer and cook, stirring occasionally, for 10-15 minutes, allowing the sauce to thicken and the oil to separate slightly.

instructions.title: Blend and Refine the Sauce
instructions.text: Carefully transfer the sauce mixture to a blender and blend until completely smooth. You may strain it through a fine-mesh sieve for an extra silky texture, then return it to the pan.

instructions.title: Combine and Finish
instructions.text: Add the cooked chicken pieces and cashew paste (or heavy cream) to the smooth sauce. Stir well and simmer for another 5-7 minutes, allowing the flavors to meld and the chicken to absorb the sauce. Crush the kasoori methi between your palms and stir it into the butter chicken.

instructions.title: Serve Hot
instructions.text: Remove from heat. Swirl in the fresh cream and garnish generously with fresh chopped cilantro. Serve hot with naan bread, roti, or basmati rice.

tips: For a richer flavor, char the marinated chicken pieces in a tandoor or under a broiler before adding to the sauce.
If you want a truly smooth sauce, blend the tomato base until perfectly smooth, then pass it through a fine-mesh sieve to remove any remaining solids.
Always finish with a touch of fresh cream and kasoori methi (dried fenugreek leaves) to get that authentic Butter Chicken aroma and flavor.
article: Butter Chicken Murgh Makhani is a beloved Indian Lunch Recipes dish enjoyed across Indian. This authentic recipe brings traditional flavors to your kitchen.
